.opencode/
.gemini/

parts.text: create a gitignore folder and add all the executables, artifacts other typical gitignore files.

The user wants me to create a .gitignore file with common patterns for executables, artifacts, and other typical files to ignore in a project. Let me first explore what kind of project this is to create an appropriate .gitignore.

parts.text: I've added more comprehensive patterns to the .gitignore file.

Updated `.gitignore` with additional patterns for:
- Python artifacts (`__pycache__`, `*.pyc`, `*.so`, `.pytest_cache`, etc.)
- More virtual environment patterns (`env/`, `ENV/`)
- Build/output directories (`build/`)
- Editor temporary files (`*.swp`, `*~`)
- Cache directories (`.mypy_cache`, `.ruff_cache`)
- Opencode and gemini directories

parts.text: commit all the changes, update the progress of the project.

The user wants me to:
1. Commit the changes to .gitignore
2. Update the progress of the project

Let me first check the git status to see what changes are staged/unstaged.

<content>1: # Worklog
2: 
3: ## 2026-03-04
4: - Extracted and reconstructed text from: `AI-Powered Workflow for Short-Form Video Creators & Editors.pdf`.

7:   - Scope and MVP definition

9:   - Data model and API contracts
10:   - Execution plan and demo criteria
11: - Added persistent context files so future sessions can resume without restating full context.
12: - Implemented Phase 1 baseline web app:
13:   - `server.mjs` Node HTTP server
14:   - `public/` mobile-first UI for project creation, upload, and playback
15:   - `data/` JSON persistence and `uploads/` file storage
16:   - API endpoints for health, projects, uploads
17:   - Placeholder AI endpoints for brief and checklist generation
18: - Added runtime artifact protection:
19:   - `.gitignore` rules for `data/db.json` and uploaded files
20:   - `.gitkeep` placeholders for `data/` and `uploads/`
21: - Implemented Phase 2 connected workflow:
22:   - Added `GET /api/projects/:id/context` for complete project state retrieval
23:   - Added brief input persistence endpoints
24:   - Added AI brief generation with persisted outputs
25:   - Added timestamp feedback persistence endpoints
26:   - Added AI checklist generation and persistence
27:   - Added checklist status patch endpoint
28:   - Added V1 -> V2 summary endpoint
29:   - Updated frontend to execute the full creator-editor flow
30: - Fixed backend data consistency bug:
31:   - Introduced serialized DB mutation queue to prevent concurrent write overwrite.
32: - Validated APIs end-to-end with live local server smoke tests, including concurrent generation calls.
33: - Added optional real AI provider integration:
34:   - Added OpenAI Responses API calls for brief/checklist/summary generation
35:   - Added strict JSON-schema response expectations and normalization
36:   - Added automatic fallback to heuristic generation when provider is unavailable
37: - Added `.env.example` with `OPENAI_API_KEY` and `OPENAI_MODEL` configuration.
38: - Added explicit production-readiness snapshot and rollout sequence in `docs/PRODUCTION_READINESS.md`.
39: - Updated resume flow so new sessions always load production gap context first.
40: - Implemented Phase 3.1 auth/access foundation:
41:   - Added session auth endpoints (`/api/auth/login`, `/api/auth/me`, `/api/auth/logout`)
42:   - Added persisted `users` and `sessions` records in local DB
43:   - Added project-level authorization checks on project routes
44:   - Restricted uploaded media access to authorized project members
45:   - Enforced role-based actions (creator creates project/uploads raw, editor uploads v1/v2 and updates checklist)
46:   - Updated frontend with login/logout and session-aware UX
47: - Validated auth/access behavior end-to-end with role-specific API smoke tests.
48: - Prepared Phase 3.2 checkpoint:
49:   - Confirmed clean repo baseline after auth milestone.
50:   - Marked voice-note upload + STT integration as immediate next execution target.
51: - Implemented Phase 3.2 voice-note + STT flow:
52:   - Added `POST/GET /api/projects/:id/voice-notes`
53:   - Added optional OpenAI transcription integration (`/v1/audio/transcriptions`)
54:   - Added fallback transcript behavior when provider/key unavailable
55:   - Auto-linked voice transcripts into `briefInputs` (brief context) or `comments` (feedback context)
56:   - Added voice-note visibility in project context and UI
57: - Validated voice-note flow end-to-end (auth, upload, attach, protected media access).
58: - Implemented Phase 3.3 security baseline:
59:   - Added CSRF token issuance and mutating-route CSRF validation
60:   - Added in-memory request throttling with auth-specific bucket
61:   - Made cookie `Secure` behavior environment-aware
62:   - Added runnable security smoke test script (`scripts/security_smoke_test.mjs`)
63: - Added end-to-end workflow smoke script (`scripts/workflow_smoke_test.mjs`) covering creator/editor core flow with auth and CSRF enabled.
64: - Implemented Phase 3.4 persistence abstraction:
65:   - Added `lib/state_store.mjs` with `sqlite` (default) and `json` backend support
66:   - Added `lib/object_store.mjs` with local object-store adapter
67:   - Refactored `server.mjs` persistence and uploads to use store interfaces
68:   - Added backend flags in `.env.example`: `DATA_BACKEND`, `OBJECT_STORE_BACKEND`
69:   - Extended runtime artifact ignores for SQLite state file (`data/app_state.db`)
70: - Re-ran smoke coverage after migration:
71:   - `npm run test:security` passed
72:   - `npm run test:workflow` passed
73: - Implemented Phase 3.5 audit baseline:
74:   - Added persisted `auditLogs` collection to state store normalization/defaults
75:   - Added audit event logging across key mutating workflows
76:   - Added project-scoped audit retrieval endpoint: `GET /api/projects/:id/audit-logs`
77: - Re-ran smoke coverage after audit integration:
78:   - `npm run test:security` passed
79:   - `npm run test:workflow` passed

state.title: docs/WORKLOG.md

metadata.preview:
# Worklog

## 2026-03-04
- Extracted and reconstructed text from: `AI-Powered Workflow for Short-Form Video Creators & Editors.pdf`.
- Derived constraints and acceptance conditions from the statement.
- Produced implementation blueprint:
  - Scope and MVP definition
  - Technical architecture
  - Data model and API contracts
  - Execution plan and demo criteria
- Added persistent context files so future sessions can resume without restating full context.
- Implemented Phase 1 baseline web app:
  - `server.mjs` Node HTTP server
  - `public/` mobile-first UI for project creation, upload, and playback
  - `data/` JSON persistence and `uploads/` file storage
  - API endpoints for health, projects, uploads
  - Placeholder AI endpoints for brief and checklist generation
- Added runtime artifact protection:
  - `.gitignore` rules for `data/db.json` and uploaded files
  - `.gitkeep` placeholders for `data/` and `uploads/`

parts.text: Now I need to add the .entire/ directory to gitignore and commit the changes. Then I need to update the worklog with the progress. Let me also add the .entire/ to gitignore since it appears to be an untracked artifact.
